sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 12.9 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.12)

statement.latex: Following Bass, call a group tree-free\/ if there is an ordered Abelian group$$and a$$-tree$X$such that$G$acts freely without inversion on$X$. [r]{a)} Must every finitely generated tree-free group satisfy the maximal condition for Abelian subgroups? [r]{b)} The same question for finitely presented tree-free groups.

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
